'''âzh-r-g-sh''' ('''kazhargeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wussify|wussify]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-r-g-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wussify|wussify]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-r-g-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kazhargeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhargeshoko|thizhargeshoko]] || [[word:jizhargeshoko|jizhargeshoko]] || [[word:shizhargeshoko|shizhargeshoko]] || [[word:kizhargeshoko|kizhargeshoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhargeshoko|thuthuzhargeshoko]] || [[word:jujuzhargeshoko|jujuzhargeshoko]] || [[word:shushuzhargeshoko|shushuzhargeshoko]] || [[word:kukuzhargeshoko|kukuzhargeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhargeshoko|thozhargeshoko]] || [[word:jozhargeshoko|jozhargeshoko]] || [[word:shozhargeshoko|shozhargeshoko]] || [[word:kozhargeshoko|kozhargeshoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhargeshoko|thĂŠzhargeshoko]] || [[word:jĂŠzhargeshoko|jĂŠzhargeshoko]] || [[word:shĂŠzhargeshoko|shĂŠzhargeshoko]] || [[word:kĂŠzhargeshoko|kĂŠzhargeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
